OpenClaw🦞
@openclaw
🦞 OpenClaw 2026.6.8 just dropped.
💬 Richer Telegram + WhatsApp
⚡️ Sharper agent & Gateway recovery
🧠 New models + tougher memory
📊 Native /usage footers
📱 Smoother WebChat & iOS
Let’s dig in!

From github.com
